# Version 1.4.3
**Released:** April 6, 2026

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed 502 Bad Gateway on startup caused by Caddy global options block being placed after a site block (VRB-91)
- Fixed telemetry consent banner reappearing on every page load for hosted deployments — Sentry is now auto-enabled without prompting (VRB-91)
- Fixed TypeScript build errors in Sentry web configuration caused by incorrect event type usage
